failedAssertions.reason: The rerun evidence still does not prove actual end-to-end tool activity for the benchmark workflow. Client artifacts show tool availability only, while proxy evidence still includes `ANALYSIS ROUTE: disabled 37 tools for analysis-only prompt`, so transcript plus proxy/client proof of executed tool turns is still missing.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded pass/fail outcomes for the tested session-stability CLI and cross-area assertions from the cli-benchmark flow report.

Updated rerun synthesis using the induced outage artifact (`/tmp/val_cli006_outage.jsonl`) and preserved-tools benchmark artifact (`/tmp/preserve-tool-use-benchmark.jsonl`) so VAL-CLI-006 now passes while VAL-CROSS-002 remains failed pending proof of actual end-to-end executed tool turns.
